'''Sten Thanas''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer from a long line of military officers (including [[Pter Thanas]]). Serving on the [[Hydra (Imperial I-class)|''Hydra'']] as a part of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] fleet, he was the first mate until the ship's captain was killed in an accident in a [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Thanas was killed when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] piloted the [[Sun Crusher]] through the ''Hydra'' 's bridge, completely destroying the vessel.<ref name="The Jedi Academy Sourcebook" />
